languages.text: "Я потратил целое состояние на эти зенитные батареи! Экзальт -117, немедленно выясни, почему они неисправны".

traits.locale_text: "Я потратил целое состояние на эти зенитные батареи! Экзальт -117, немедленно выясни, почему они неисправны".

languages.text: "I spent a fortune on those air defence batteries! Exalt-117, find out why they're malfunctioning immediately."
languages.original_text: "Я потратил целое состояние на эти зенитные батареи! Экзальт -117, немедленно выясни, почему они неисправны".

traits.locale_text: "I spent a fortune on those air defence batteries! Exalt-117, find out why they're malfunctioning immediately."
"I spent a fortune on those air defence batteries! Exalt-117, find out why they're malfunctioning immediately."
"I spent a fortune on those air defence batteries! Exalt-117, find out why they're malfunctioning immediately."

languages.text: "Ich habe ein Vermögen in diese Flugabwehrbatterien investiert! Exalt-117, findet auf der Stelle heraus, warum sie nicht funktionieren."
languages.original_text: "I spent a fortune on those air defence batteries! Exalt-117, find out why they're malfunctioning immediately."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe ein Vermögen in diese Flugabwehrbatterien investiert! Exalt-117, findet auf der Stelle heraus, warum sie nicht funktionieren."

languages.text: “我花了一大笔钱买那些防空炮组！尊使-117，立刻查清它们故障的原因。”
languages.original_text: "I spent a fortune on those air defence batteries! Exalt-117, find out why they're malfunctioning immediately."

traits.locale_text: “我花了一大笔钱买那些防空炮组！尊使-117，立刻查清它们故障的原因。”

languages.text: « J'ai dépensé une fortune pour ces batteries d'artillerie antiaériennes ! Exalt-117, découvrez la source du dysfonctionnement, sur le champ. »
languages.original_text: "I spent a fortune on those air defence batteries! Exalt-117, find out why they're malfunctioning immediately."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai dépensé une fortune pour ces batteries d'artillerie antiaériennes ! Exalt-117, découvrez la source du dysfonctionnement, sur le champ. »

languages.text: «¡Me he gastado una fortuna en esas baterías antiaéreas! Exaltado-117, averigüe en el acto por qué se han averiado».
languages.original_text: "I spent a fortune on those air defence batteries! Exalt-117, find out why they're malfunctioning immediately."

traits.locale_text: «¡Me he gastado una fortuna en esas baterías antiaéreas! Exaltado-117, averigüe en el acto por qué se han averiado».

languages.text: "O hava savunma bataryalarına bir servet harcadım! Yüce-117, neden arızalandıklarını derhâl öğren."
languages.original_text: "I spent a fortune on those air defence batteries! Exalt-117, find out why they're malfunctioning immediately."

traits.locale_text: "O hava savunma bataryalarına bir servet harcadım! Yüce-117, neden arızalandıklarını derhâl öğren."

languages.text: 「あの防空砲に莫大な費用を費やしたのに！エクサルト117、すぐに原因を突き止めろ！」
languages.original_text: "I spent a fortune on those air defence batteries! Exalt-117, find out why they're malfunctioning immediately."

traits.locale_text: 「あの防空砲に莫大な費用を費やしたのに！エクサルト117、すぐに原因を突き止めろ！」
